summary:
END TIMES EXPECTATIONS AND GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS: Brandon shares that the world is in the final days, anticipating divine manifestations and a coming revival marked by supernatural signs. He transitions into discussing geopolitical events, particularly focusing on Russia, Ukraine, and the United States. Brandon compares President Donald Trump to the cartoon character Mr. Magoo, stating that despite appearing to stumble toward disaster, Trump is consistently saved and made victorious by the hand of God. Brandon cautions regarding Trump's current decisions and warns him to be careful about his inner circle and those offering false olive branches. He details a vision concerning Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, describing a scenario where Zelensky is removed from power in a covert operation after engaging in illicit activities and attempting to flee with large sums of money. In this vision, Russia takes control of eastern Ukraine up to Kyiv, installing a puppet government that brings temporary peace by eliminating the influence of the European Union and French President Emmanuel Macron.

GLOBAL THREATS AND MEDIA DECEPTION: Brandon outlines further geopolitical warnings, including Russia's potential maneuvers with the BRICS system, Cuba, and the US dollar. He describes a vision of Russian President Vladimir Putin orchestrating a major conflict using a novel weapon over Warsaw, strategically waiting for weaker American leadership to execute his plans. Referencing a past prophecy by Kim Clement, Brandon warns of a grand deception where Russia will falsely extend a hand of friendship to Christians and Jews, ultimately leading to severe persecution. He predicts a significant rise in global anti-Semitism, potentially triggered by Israel taking unilateral military action against Iran, which will prompt Jewish populations to relocate to Israel. Additionally, Brandon cautions about upcoming false flag events designed to manipulate public attention back toward mainstream media outlets. He asserts that alternative media figures are gaining influence, prompting mainstream networks to use fabricated crises to regain credibility and control over information, food, and politics.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND CULTURAL CRITIQUE: Brandon critiques the Super Bowl halftime show, citing claims from a former devil worshiper that the performance and its stage design contained satanic significance. He contrasts this darkness with the necessity for believers to remain vigilant and spiritually grounded. Discussing domestic issues, Brandon mentions a mass shooting in British Columbia and emphasizes the importance of spiritual protection over children in schools. He advocates for believers to be strictly led by the Holy Spirit in their daily lives, recounting a story about a pastor who followed divine intuition in a retail store to pray for a woman whose son was subsequently healed of stage four cancer. Brandon emphasizes the power of covenant prayer, the authority of the believer, and the necessity of using biblical scripture as a weapon against demonic attacks.

NATIONAL INTERCESSION AND FUTURE PREDICTIONS: Brandon intercedes for the United States and President Trump, praying that the president receives godly counsel and makes decisions that align with divine will. He explicitly rejects Agenda 2030 and prays for a national revival characterized by repentance and holiness in churches. Brandon prophesies about the years 2026 through 2028, predicting increased censorship pressures on digital platforms and warning of potential biological weapons being secretly transported from Russia to Cuba. He anticipates a significant prayer gathering on May 17th and a spiritual wave during the 2026 midterms, predicting that this generation will witness widespread miraculous healings.

PROVISION AND FERTILITY BLESSINGS: Brandon focuses on specific prayers for material provision, advocating for faith in debt-free homes, reliable vehicles, and quality clothing. A significant portion of his focus is directed toward fertility and family planning. Brandon prays for couples struggling with infertility, declaring supernatural healing over reproductive organs and praying against miscarriages, postpartum depression, and developmental disorders like autism and Down syndrome. During this prayer, he shares a vision of a weeping willow tree adorned with small Valentine hearts, which he links to incoming children. He encourages families to believe for multiple children as a form of divine restitution for what the enemy has stolen, concluding with a declaration of joy and laughter based on biblical promises.
rawData: [February 15, 2026]-[Come pray with us]-[https://youtu.be/YCq4oFKaqL4]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me again today. And Diana today, I'm so excited to have you with us. She's been so busy doing some other stuff for the ministry and doing things; I haven't been able to have her on as much. And I told her, I said, 'Tonight you are going to be on here with me. I need you.' So, I'm excited you're here. I sure love you. You know, we're going to go over some of the things. Tell everybody hi. Hi. Yeah, we're so grateful. You know, it's exciting to be in the ministry and pushing like we do. We know Jesus is coming. We have an expectation. People say, 'Brandon, what do you do? Do you really believe Jesus is coming beyond anything?' I'm telling you, we are at the last seconds of the last days. Jesus Christ is coming, ladies and gentlemen. And it's time for you to have your expectation of the manifestations and the glory of God. Get excited about what God's about to do in these last days. I'll go over a little bit of what I saw in the revival. I told you about the angels and the oil coming out of the sky. And people are like, 'Brandon, that's way over the top.' And I'm like, 'Yeah, that's exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think.' God we serve. But I want to talk about today, wherever you are—morning, day, or night. I want to talk about what's going on with Russia. What I feel about some of this caution that I have in the Valley of Decision that President Trump is making right now. And I want to say this: Diana and I tease around with each other about calling him Mr. Magoo and things like that. We don't mean any disrespect toward the president. We pray for him. We love our president and stand with him, but just teasing around. I would say even if I got to be his friend and hang out with him, I'd call him Mr. Magoo because in the natural, he always seems to look like he's about to go off a cliff, but God saves him and he wins the case. Mr. Magoo was always victorious. So, it wasn't that Mr. Magoo was an idiot; Mr. Magoo won. And you're always like, 'How did that happen?' It was just the hand of God. This is how you look at some of the things when you watch him and you're going, 'I don't know, is this going to turn out okay?' But God. And that's why I say Mr. Magoo was one of those ones. You watched him on the cartoon whenever we were growing up and he was walking on the steel beam and it went through the window and he walked out on the other side, but he never got hurt and you're going, 'That was pretty cool.' And so that's why we laugh. We call this lots of prayer. So we know that Mr. Magoo is going to turn out okay. And so we're just not going to worry about him. Why is he talking to Russia right now? What's he doing? Mr. Magoo, don't talk to Russia. I don't mean disrespect, but I'm just saying it made me think of it a lot whenever I hear these articles. And so I reached out to Diana and I said, 'You know what? What do you think about what's going on?' She had told me, she said, 'This is what my daddy prophesied concerning Russia.' And I'll play that clip in just a second, but I want to go over what the Lord showed us. Probably back—I don't know, Braden can show you a little clip of it—but I saw a Jason Bourne type of experience. I saw Zelensky snorting coke and he had prostitutes around him. I saw that he had a hundred million in $100 bills and they were on a plane and he was going to flee. But there was a plan in the days ahead with Russia and America to remove him like a Jason Bourne experience. So I saw a Jason Bourne kind of a decision being made when this happened. I saw Russia get half of Ukraine all the way up to Kyiv and they brought in a new government that was pro-Russia, pro-Ukraine, and it brought peace to the area because the puppet was being manipulated by the EU and Macron, and he was looking with his Pinocchio nose towards Macron asking, 'What should we do? What should we do?' So, I thought this was kind of interesting because whenever I had the visitation with the Lord and He was here in the vision, I saw a Russian man on his belly with a black stocking hat and black pants, black everything. So then I give that word of what I heard the Lord say. And then he goes and becomes buddies with Russia. Let's bring our dollar together again. Look at this article right here. Now you see what Russia is saying today, that they want to join up with America and the dollar and they're wanting to do... so what is happening with the BRICS if they do that? Are they abandoning the BRICS system when they said, 'We'll help Cuba out' with the next one I saw right here? You can see that. So Cuba and Russia are wanting to do oil agreements and all that. So what's going on with all this? Is this just a smoke screen? Because I saw the Tasmanian looking devil spinning around Putin creating major war with this new weapon over Warsaw that has never been used before. And he had his hands like this looking at his cards and he said, 'I just have to buy the time to get through your presidency and then I'll make my move,' because he was looking for weaker leadership. So he was looking at his poker cards. He had a poker face, as you saw in the cartoon that we made, and he was trying to figure out what his best move was to win the game because he wants to win all of these areas back—what was the former Soviet Union and all that back then. So we see this stuff. What's happening right now with his decision? Is he being sneaky? I believe he is. I want you to hear this word from Kim Clement back—I don't even know, she didn't tell me the date of this. It's a 47-second word. 'The other thing the Lord said to me today, Jacob,' he said, 'Kim, tell my people to keep their eye on Russia because there's a huge deception that is taking place and is yet to unveil and where people will even embrace it. I'm not sure exactly what it is, but I saw this hand coming out of Russia and this hand being extended out to the Christian people and to the Jews as if it were a friend. It is not a friend. Russia is not a friend to the Jews and not a friend to the Christians. I'm not speaking about the people of Russia. I'm talking about the administration and the leaders. I saw deception coming out of Russia. I saw a hand coming out as if to shake and then as the hand was shaken by purple robes and garments of religion, I saw the hand raised up and then smashing them on the neck.' So I think that's interesting. I believe the hand he's talking about is all of the persecution that's coming to the church, persecution coming to the Jews, all the things that I've seen, the antisemitism, the things that are about to erupt on another level. But like I said, I know he flowed in the prophetic. I see visions and I believe visions change through prayer. Prayer changes things. Now, I believe a vision is a lot different than a prophetic 'Thus saith the Lord.' There's a lot of people that disagree with me. I don't care what you really believe. It's whatever you feel the Lord's leading you. That's just what I feel. I see a lot of visions and the Lord shows me these things through prayer. He said, 'Your job is to have a prayer channel and tell people what's coming and you'll change things through prayer.' And that's why I've always looked at it as a watchman telling people. Now, is it prophetic? I said it has a prophetic lens. It's different in my opinion, but I yield to the anointing of the prophet. We hear all this stuff going on. We see these major things taking place. I thought it was really interesting. Diana said, 'Did you notice the people on Twitter talking about the three electric poles at the Super Bowl that looked like Bunny was on the one in the middle with the cross, and it looked like he was being like Jesus?' I wondered a lot about what the satanic significance was behind it because the Lord said there was great satanic significance behind the Super Bowl halftime show. Well, we know there's a lot of Jezebels running around and dancing and acting stupid. But what we saw with the guy that used to be the devil worshipper that got born again was directly communicating to the devil. He made a video talking about how demonic the Super Bowl halftime show was. Now, I didn't watch all of it, but I think it was interesting. I believe his name is John Ramirez or something like that. I don't remember; Braden can put it in there below. I don't know much about this man, but I thought it was interesting because he said that there was a lot of satanic things about the Super Bowl halftime show. Now, I didn't watch it. It was trash. And so anytime you have a bunch of hussies running around there, I protect and honor my wife. I'm going to look down at the ground; it was bad. It's embarrassing the kind of trash they try to feed us on the internet or on TV. Our youth kids were having youth things, and our church was having a Super Bowl party—I don't even know what they did—and how embarrassing that was with the people of the church, having anyone see some of the things that were shown during that. I'm just telling you all, we're in a time like never before where the dark is getting darker, but the light is getting lighter. Now, going over those prophetic words, going over what the Lord has showed us about the Mabee Center and getting excited about it. But there is darkness, and I feel great caution about this valley of decision and what's happening with Trump right now. I said great anti-Semitism would come out in the days ahead. Why? Because I believe Israel will probably act alone against Iran. Maybe they will, and we'll back them. Why would there be so much anti-Semitism across the world that the Jewish community would uproot and want to move back home because they felt their lives were in danger being a Jew in New York or wherever? There's something that's going to trigger this; the Lord is warning of this. The other part—now I was waking up, and in between being awake and asleep, I heard this: I told you there would be black swan false flag events that would bring attention back to ABC, NBC, CBS, CNN to give them credibility, trying to get credibility back to them, to get a foothold to get you to feel sorry for them and want to be watching them again. I'll say that again. They are going to try to cause a distraction to get you to look over here because they're losing their audience. And the Lord said, 'Watch for major events in the days ahead that will cause you to look more to MSNBC, ABC, CBS, CNN.' What's happened in the last couple of days? Now, I'm not trying to be disrespectful toward the lady who got kidnapped—I'm not at all—but I want you to be smarter. Think about this. The lady, the FBI, all this, it's all about her family and the network that she works for. What happened with this? Is there more to this? Does that make sense what I'm trying to tell you all? Is this the event that draws people back over there to click on them instead of watching social media as much to give ABC, NBC, CBS more of a foothold? A little bit of something, then a little bit more, to get them more credibility. You know what? Because you start to feel sorry for the individual. You start because we're sympathetic. Oh, the 85-year-old woman. It's really sad. Her mom and everybody watches. But then you have a personal connection. You don't even know her, but a lot of people will get personal connections through stories and through social media when you don't even know who these people are through Erica, through all this different stuff. And then you have scandals about Erica on there, and they're talking about all this stuff. I just stay out of all the stuff. I don't care. People send me something, 'Hey Diana, you need to read it.' And I told her, 'Diana, we've got to get more filtering our filter.' Does that make sense? But I'm trying to tell you what I'm hearing. Remember the events to get back this over here, a sleight of hand. The enemy is going to try to do this somehow. And I thought, what would ever make a people want to watch them ever again? How will they do that subtly? Another 9/11 event? I don't know. What makes them become the victim? What makes the American people feel sorry for them a little bit? Is it one thing or is it multiple things? But the Lord said it was coming because alternative media like Alex Jones and Benny Johnson and some of these others are drawing so much attraction. Their channels are exploding—six million views, all this stuff. And so I went back and I was looking: what's the average view count through Google for some of these TV networks like Christian television? And they said an average view count on their whole channel for a day watching them speak was only 150,000. Not even over a million. And I won't tell you who that was, but I saw a Christian organization; their main thing was 150,000 on their TV a day. And they have millions of dollars of overhead. I thought that surely that can't be right. But when you look at what they say about how much in a day CNN and some of these other places get, it's only a couple million. They're losing their audience. But when you look at Benny Johnson's video count and the subscribers and the views he gets on a video, it's by the millions. Alex Jones by the millions. They're pulling from that pool. So how do they bring back those people? And that's what I'm trying to say. The Lord said because what they want to do in the days ahead is to get a foothold in the media, a foothold in the food, a foothold in the politics—a foothold because they have to get you to believe and think they're credible again because they've lost their credibility. And people and the world, not just the body of Christ, are saying, 'We're done.' So we're seeing it. Let's see what happens in the days ahead. The Lord said, 'Watch 2026, 2027, and 2028.' And they will say there will be more pressure on YouTube to censor what these big YouTube platforms and news media stations will be able to say because they'll take away their AdSense and things like that. They'll be able to say, 'Listen, you're going to say what we want you to say on your platform or we're taking this away from you.' And that's what I saw happening. So I just wanted to go over that because those are the things I'm seeing. This is big. There's a lot, but I haven't wanted to be quick in just releasing videos about some of this stuff because I feel it; there's a changing of the tide. There's something happening in this valley of decision right now. There are some major decisions being made as Benjamin came to the White House yesterday or the day before yesterday. Folks, this is what I saw. This is what the Lord warned us about. We're here; it's time to wake up. What will come in 2026? What will the rest of it be like? What will we see within these 250 years? And I told you about Red Dawn experiences and shakings in our nation—shaking in Europe, the Euro, the plagues, and the things with the biolab. All the things that a biolab just got busted and he was experimenting with mice and all this stuff. I was like, "This is not a Batman movie. This is real-life stuff. This isn't watching Spider-Man and seeing who the new villain is. This is real stuff. Who's Professor Xavier or whoever?" I don't know. You see some of these Superman movies with the bad guys and you go, "What is going on? This is real-life superhero weirdness." I just try to go over it. We love every single one of you and we're so thankful that you're here. Like I said, I'm just kind of watching. I feel a caution. I feel that major storm on the East Coast. I told you I saw biological weapons being taken from Russia to put into Cuba. Is this the opportunity where they're doing that? And they were putting them underground, saying "storm here." It was in the middle of the night—the trafficking and the things. And here we see Venezuela and all this stuff going on. Is this all coming about where you let your guard down? President Trump, be careful who you trust. Be careful who you let into your inner circle. Be careful who extends an olive branch of peace to you, saying, "Hey, we want to be your friend all of a sudden," when they were your worst enemy. Remember who is in your inner circle and who you're trusting. Do not trust so easily. Be watchful over who's in your inner circle and take no counsel from the ungodly. It's so important because all it takes is one bad decision to cause the house of cards to fall. China and Taiwan—all this major stuff. Let's pray and take communion. This is my favorite part. Every time I talk, I try to keep it as short as I can. So, Father, we just lift up this body before You. We're so thankful for this time of prayer and just seeking You, God. We're so thankful for where we are in these end times. I truly believe we're at that point like You said back in September—the point of no return where we're about to see an acceleration of things that's going to be shock and awe. Lord, I'm so grateful. I don't want to look at it and say life is bad. Lord, we're ready to get out of here. I'm just looking forward to being with You, not by death but by the rapture of the church. I'm so thankful, Father, that You are coming back and we'll be reunited with all our loved ones. It's just a glorious day. Oh, what a day of rejoicing that will be when we all get to heaven. We'll sing and shout the victory. Isn't that wonderful? It's going to be exciting. Everything we've ever believed for will be complete within our glorified bodies. We'll be standing before our King. Jesus Christ is coming; I just look forward to it. We take this body and thank You, Lord, for this time when everyone is focused on love. They say we focus on Cupid and all that stuff, but no, I just love my wife. We have an extra day of just loving each other—an extra day of being on a honeymoon. I think it's a good time to reflect and rekindle the fire in your marriage. You don't have to believe in all the weirdness. We just love each other, and it's a good day to love on your wife. Any day is a good day to love on your wife, but especially on Valentine's Day, try to be extra special. I think it's always good to sow love into the marriage and into the person who has given their life to you and given you children. Does that make sense? It's important. I think men don't need to be a fuddy-duddy. Be fun. Have fun. Be spontaneous. Love your spouse. Love your wives. Love your husbands. Pray with each other and honor each other. I really truly believe I can always feel when there's a flow in the spirit. I always say, "Okay, Diana, we've got to pray more together. We've got to read more together." You can feel it when you're in a covenant relationship and you're pushing together. For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there I am in the midst of them—Matthew 18:20. All glory to God. I believe that's what happens when you pray with your spouse. If you say, "I don't have anybody," well, we'll be your two. Diana and I will agree with you. If you're single, we'll agree with you. That's why we're here—praying with you to agree with you. If you're a single mother or a single father and don't have anybody to agree with, Diana and I will agree with you. We pray and touch and agree, saying, "Whatever things are bound on earth are bound in heaven. Whatever things are loosed on earth are loosed in heaven." We believe in the power of covenant and prayer. Whenever we agree, anything can be done. Two, three, four, or five agreeing—I believe with all my heart that many hands make light work. And so that's where we are in these end times—believing together as believers standing as a family. That's why we say "Good morning, family." We believe it. We are the body of Christ. People say, "I'm Catholic." I love the Catholics. Come on over here. We love the Church of Christ. We want the Baptists. We're not just about being charismatic here; we want the body of Christ. Now, you say, "Brandon, you say certain things." Well, yes, because I believe certain things, but I'm just saying that out of love. We can agree to disagree. I don't always agree with my extended family. You don't have to agree with everybody. I have aunts that believe in the whole tribulation and things like that, and I agree to disagree, but I still love them. It's amazing when you can just love each other in spite of differences. We don't have to be mean. You don't have to be a "Sister Clipboard" and pick on people. Just say, "Hey, we love you. We don't have to agree on everything. You're entitled to your opinion." We still love you. On this day, we can focus on love. Love takes no account of a suffered wrong as we get ready for the day of love. God is love. Walk in love in the days ahead because faith works by love. If you feel like your faith is stagnant, check your love walk. I don't always agree with what people say and preach from the pulpit. But as Brother Hagin used to say all the time, you have to eat the hay and spit out the sticks. There's something good you can find in anything, but you have to eat the hay and spit out the sticks. And so that's what we do. Find books that help you grow. So Father, we thank you. I thank you, Father, for the body, and we take it right now. We believe that we receive your healing power that flows on the inside of us in the name of Jesus. We take the blood. We apply the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We plead the blood over our homes and over our finances. We call those things that be not as though they were. We speak blessing, increase, multiplication, and favor over everything we put our hands to. We thank you, Lord, for what a God we serve, that we're blessed. We have increase, we have favor. We call in the financial seeds we sow; we call for a harvest over them: thirty, sixty, and a hundredfold. I speak to the seeds that I have sowed. You don't go dormant anymore; you spring forth much fruit in the name of Jesus. Now, angels of the Lord—we thank you, Lord—go, ministering spirits, and cause it to come forth in the name of Jesus. I call forth my harvest, a bountiful, beautiful harvest full of financial blessing. Now God, I thank you, Lord, that where I've sowed bad seed and we need a crop failure, I call for crop failure in the name of Jesus. I repent over the bad seeds I've sowed. Thank you, Lord, they're washed in the blood. Father, we call for crop failure over those seeds. We thank you, Lord, that over the ones we sowed that were bad, we call for crop failure. We say your blessing and grace covers it in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that your hand is on those good seeds. The bad seeds are drying up and going away; the birds are eating them because we don't want to reap bad stuff. Seedtime and harvest never cease. Whatsoever a man sows, that will he also eat. You have good seed and you have bad seed. That's what I'm talking about. You think, 'Well, everything is good in mine.' Baloney. There are times when you might have sowed some bad seeds. You might have treated somebody badly or spoken to someone badly. There are bad seeds. You might have done something wrong, treated somebody disrespectfully, or done them wrong in business. I don't want to reap that. Father, we ask for repentance over these things. I thank you, Lord, for the blood. That's why we plead the blood and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood of Jesus over us in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord. We thank you for the weather, the rain, and the harvest. We thank you, Lord, for the grass growing, the trees, and all the birds and beautiful things that you're providing for us. It's almost springtime, and we're so grateful, Father, that the weather is turning even prettier right now. God, we give you praise and glory for it right now in Jesus' name. We take this blood and apply it over us in Jesus' name. Amen and amen. Lord, we thank you for it. Father, I thank you. Right now, I plead the blood of Jesus over anything you want to show us. So that it is uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic spirit, I apply the blood of Jesus over our prayer time. We thank you, Father, that the angels of the Lord are camping around and about us. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus over us, and we are not snared by any familiar spirits because we're always staying close to the Vine. Thank you, Father. We're so grateful for all that you've done and continue to do. We yield to the anointing of the prophet. I yield. Whatever you want to show me, Father, to warn the people, we humble ourselves before you. We attract to deflect. We don't use you; you use us. It's not about us trying to use you, Father. We're a vessel. You're the potter; we're the clay. We humble ourselves before you today. We know that apart from you, we can do nothing. As He is, so are we in this world. I thank you, Father. What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. Oh, precious is the flow that makes me white as snow. No other fount I know, nothing but the blood of Jesus. So Father, we just thank you, Lord, for this time. We plead the blood of Jesus Christ over every single one of us here. We thank you, Lord, that we're always in the right place at the right time. For the families up in British Columbia affected by the mass shooting, Father, I thank you that such things stop. We plead the blood over our children when they go into schools. No weapon formed against them will prosper. A thousand shall fall at their side and ten thousand at their right hand, but it will not come nigh. We take our authority over our school districts and over where our kids go to school. We plead the blood of Jesus over our children today. We thank you, Lord, that they will go into school and the light of God will shine on them so much that the teacher says, 'There's something different about your little girl, about your boy there.' And you say, 'Oh, it's because they have Jesus.' Because they're so used to heathens being around them, they go, 'There's something good about your kids.' Why? Because they stand out above everybody else, and the glory of the Lord is risen on your children. Arise and shine, for the light has come and the glory of the Lord has risen on our kids, our wives, and my husband. We believe that the angels of the Lord camp around and about them in the name of Jesus. Father, you go before us and you prepare the way. If you say, 'Don't go today, there's going to be something happening,' we're quick to hear you, Lord. We're quick to hear and obey. When you say, 'Don't go here,' we hear you. You told us in times past that there would be days ahead when if you don't listen closely concerning certain decisions you make for that day, there will be people who will not be there that night. They'll go home early because they're not following the voice of the Lord because of how dark these days are. If you have that inward check—for as many as are led by the Spirit of God are the sons and daughters of God—I believe that if you're led by the Spirit of God, He will lead you and guide you into all truth. You don't need a prophetic voice to tell you what to do. Right now, in the name of Jesus, we come before you, Father, boldly knowing that those who are led by the Spirit of God are the sons and daughters of God. We will be led by that peace that passes all understanding. You said, 'Follow that inward peace. Follow that peace that passes all understanding.' We will be led by the Spirit of God today. When you speak, we will hear your voice, and a stranger's voice we will not follow. We take authority over every demonic assignment, every plot, every plan, and every pursuit of wickedness concerning my life, our ministry, and the people on this channel. We believe, Father, that those who are led by the Spirit of God are the sons and the daughters of God, and they'll be led when it comes to where they're supposed to be living, working, and going to school or church. They'll be led by the Spirit of God. You say, "Hey, it's not just meant for you to be in whatever church you want to be at." You should be led by the Spirit of God, for they are the daughters and the sons of God. Father, I believe that we're led by the Spirit today on where we're supposed to be at church, where we're supposed to be living, and where we're supposed to go to work. It's not what we think; it's because we're led by the Spirit of God. You say, "Well, I don't know about that." I do. That's what the Word says.
